items.md:
**351 (30/3) - December 1969 - 36 pages**
Front cover (art only): The nephews hide with a turkey as Donald, dressed as a pilgrim, walks by. *(May 6, 1969)*
This is, to date, Bark's last original artwork for a cover of Walt Disney's Comics.
DONALD DUCK - 10 - Reprinted from Walt Disney's Comics No. 147, December 1952.
